definition: A set of strings over an alphabet governed by explicit rules.
A finite set of symbols used to build strings.
A finite sequence of symbols from an alphabet.
A set of rules defining valid symbolic structures.
A recognized unit created from raw characters during lexical analysis.
A system that checks structure and often builds a parse tree.
Rules that determine whether an expression is well-formed.
Rules or context that determine what a valid expression means.
A formal rule set for structured data.
